themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 12 verses. Commentary leans on "But Jehoshabeath, the daughter of the king, took Joash the son of Ahaziah, and stole him from...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And it came to pass, that, when Jehu was executing judgment upon the house of Ahab, and found...". Word-study detail reinforces "כְּהִשָּׁפֵ֥ט: was executing judgment - to judge, i.e., pronounce sentence (for or against);...".
